zh.lifeSummary: 當Rissa de Dursley於大約1035年出生時，她的父親King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark17歲，母親Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark17歲。她於1048年與Eadnoth the Constable在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1069年在英國格盧斯特斯爾度斯利享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rissa de Dursley于大约1035年出生时，她的父亲King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark17岁，母亲Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark17岁。她于1048年与Eadnoth the Constable在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1069年在英国格盧斯特斯爾度斯利享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dursley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Dursley (Gloucs), recorded as Dereslege in 1216, and Duresley in 1334.

variants.name: Dearsley
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Derisley Farm in Woodditton (Cambs).

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Rissa de Dursley was born about 1035, her father, King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark, was 17 and her mother, Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, was 17. She married Eadnoth the Constable in 1048, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1069, in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rissa de Dursley est née environ 1035, son père, King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Eadnoth the Constable en 1048, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1069, à Dursley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rissa de Dursley um 1035 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark 17 und ihre Mutter Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark 17. Sie hat 1048 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Eadnoth the Constable geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1069 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rissa de Dursley è nata il circa 1035, sua padre, King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Eadnoth the Constable nel 1048, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1069, nel Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rissa de Dursleyが約1035年に生まれた時，父King Svend II Estridsen of Denmarkは17歳，母Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmarkは17歳であった。1048年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでEadnoth the Constableと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1069年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダルスリーで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rissa de Dursley(이)가 대략 1035년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1048년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Eadnoth the Constable(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1069년 영국 그루스스터실르 뒤르슬리에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rissa de Dursley nasceu aproximadamente 1035, seu pai, King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Eadnoth the Constable em 1048, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1069, em Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rissa de Dursley родилась около 1035 г., её отцу по имени King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eadnoth the Constable в 1048 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1069 г. в местности дурсли, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rissa de Dursley nació aproximadamente 1035, su papá, King Svend II Estridsen of Denmark, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Queen Gunhild Sveinsdatter of Danmark, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Eadnoth the Constable en 1048, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1069, en Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
